data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. ( (TELO) ).

On August 28, 2025, Telomir Pharmaceuticals, Inc. successfully completed the sale of 1,550,000 shares of its common stock to institutional investors at an average price of $1.87 per share, generating gross proceeds of approximately $2.9 million. This transaction, facilitated through Rodman & Renshaw via the StockBlock platform, was conducted without the inclusion of any warrants and reflects a premium to the prior day’s closing price, potentially indicating strong investor confidence and positively impacting the company’s financial position.

data.title: Limitless X Holdings Announces Strategic Transformation
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Limitless X Holdings ( (LIMX) ) has issued an update.

On September 3, 2025, Limitless X Holdings announced a strategic transformation, emphasizing a shift to a fully integrated platform and the elimination of third-party dependencies. This transformation includes in-house control of operations and marketing, a focus on innovative product development, and expansion into new market sectors. The company also highlighted its SEC-approved Regulation A Tier 2 Offering, aimed at expanding its capital markets access and investor base. Additionally, Limitless X is working on debt reduction and balance sheet strengthening to enhance stability and focus on growth. The company’s initiatives in digital assets, film production, and personalized wellness aim to create a scalable platform and deepen customer engagement.

More about Limitless X Holdings

Limitless X Holdings Inc. operates in the health and wellness industry, focusing on direct-to-consumer dietary supplements and consumer packaged goods. The company is expanding its reach into various sectors, including television and film, regenerative skin care, fintech, entertainment, and real estate. Its primary products include dietary supplements like NZT-48 and Oneshot Nootropic Pre-Workout, and it aims to build a ‘Look Good, Feel Great’ ecosystem.

Average Trading Volume: 7,206

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $37.18M

Matex International Limited ( (SG:M15) ) has provided an announcement.

Matex International Limited, a company incorporated in Singapore, has announced an update regarding the High Court case HC/OA 790/2025. The hearing, initially scheduled for 4 September 2025, has been adjourned to 5 September 2025. The company has also noted that the trading suspension on its securities, effective since 23 July 2025, remains in place. Shareholders and potential investors are advised to stay informed through company announcements and seek professional advice if needed.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2529) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Co., Ltd has received a writ of summons from the High Court of Hong Kong, initiated by Toppan Nexus Holdings Limited, claiming an outstanding balance of USD 615,200 for services provided. The company disputes this claim and plans to defend itself legally, advising shareholders and potential investors to exercise caution while dealing with its shares.

data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Sikri Holding AS ( (DE:57U0) ) has provided an update.

Spir Group ASA is preparing for an extraordinary general meeting on 11 September 2025, where the chair of the board, Rolv Erik Ryssdal, has secured voting proxies for 75,439,586 shares, representing 56.74% of the company’s outstanding shares. Including his direct and indirect holdings, Ryssdal controls a total of 58.13% of the shares and votes, potentially influencing the meeting’s outcomes significantly.

More about Sikri Holding AS

Spir Group is a Nordic software company that provides mission-critical software and data solutions within the real estate sector. The company focuses on streamlining complex real estate processes through specialized niche software and data, serving a diverse clientele including real estate agents, banks, insurance companies, appraisers, property developers, and more.

data.title: PMGC Holdings Announces Reverse Stock Split Effective September
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from PMGC Holdings ( (ELAB) ).

On August 28, 2025, PMGC Holdings Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol ELAB, announced a 1-for-3.5 reverse stock split of its common stock, effective September 2, 2025. This move will consolidate every 3.5 shares into one, adjusting the number of shares outstanding and the share price proportionally, without affecting the overall value of shareholder equity. The company expects the number of shares outstanding to decrease from approximately 2,369,727 to 677,000 post-split. The trading symbol will remain ‘ELAB,’ but the stock will receive a new CUSIP number. This adjustment aims to enhance the company’s market positioning by potentially increasing the stock price and making it more attractive to investors.

Spark’s Take on ELAB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELAB is a Underperform.

ELEVAI Labs Inc. is rated poorly due to major financial weaknesses, including negative revenue and cash flow issues, which are exacerbated by adverse technical indicators. The lack of favorable valuation metrics further weighs down the stock’s score. The absence of applicable corporate events means no positive catalysts are present to offset these challenges.

To see Spark’s full report on ELAB stock, click here.
